title: Gravelly
description: Enhances gravel making it useful along with rivers biomes!
body:
A simple mod that makes unique features related to gravel: Ore deposits!

There are two tipes:

Iron deposits: Generate in river biome, drop 1 iron nugget

Gold deposits: Same, but generates in frozen rivers

This mod is going to be updated, please keep this in mind, these features may have changes or some new may arrive!
